data.body:
Medical evacuations are increasingly the only hope for thousands of Palestinians in Gaza, reports Paul Hefel-James, like 9-year-old Hala who suffers from congenital heart condition.

Yet Israel has slowed those evacuations to a trickle, with far too many Palestinians remaining stuck in Gaza today.
